news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."

news.title: New York to impose first statewide moratorium on data centers
news.description: [CP24 TORONTO] New York will block the construction of any new large data centres for up to a year so the state can create rules to protect the environment and energy grid from the power-hungry facilities that fuel artificial intelligence technology.

news.title: Hundreds of economists say 'we must act now' on AI’s economic impact and job displacement risks
news.description: [THE MANILA TIMES] SAN FRANCISCO — Hundreds of economists say in an open letter that institutions “must act now” to address how artificial intelligence could transform the economy and could put many people out of work.
